news:news.news:title: Severe weather and violence marked today's headlines, with a storm in Greece causing fatalities and a tragic shooting in New York City claiming a baby's life.
news:news.news:keywords: global weather events, US violence news, Brazil pet custody law, Venezuela US relations, Burkina Faso human rights

news:news.news:title: US crude oil prices surged to $110 a barrel amid geopolitical tensions, while Oracle announced significant job cuts as it shifts focus to AI investments.
news:news.news:keywords: oil prices and market impact, Oracle job cuts and AI investment, Trump's influence on economic policies

news:news.news:title: Tesla's sales show a slight recovery, while Meta and Google face legal challenges over social media addiction, and new tech products are launched.
news:news.news:keywords: Tesla sales report analysis, Meta and Google legal challenges, new indie gaming subscription service, Microsoft AI strategy, updates to Google Home

news:news.news:title: The NFL draft approaches with significant player movements and concerns about top quarterback prospects, while other sports see notable developments including Wembanyama's MVP chase and J. Cole's pro basketball debut.
news:news.news:keywords: NFL draft predictions, quarterback prospects analysis, Victor Wembanyama MVP race, J. Cole basketball career, NCAA eligibility changes

news:news.news:title: NASA's Artemis II mission marks the first crewed Moon flyby in over 50 years, while ancient artifacts reveal early gambling practices in America.
news:news.news:keywords: NASA Artemis II mission details, ancient gambling artifacts, new discoveries in cancer treatment, impact of diet on Alzheimer's risk, ocean ecosystem recovery signs

news:news.news:title: A magnitude 7.4 earthquake struck off Indonesia, while Israel escalates attacks in Lebanon amidst ongoing geopolitical tensions.
news:news.news:keywords: geopolitical tensions in the Middle East, impact of natural disasters, political developments in the US, Italy's World Cup failure, crime and safety in South Africa

news:news.news:title: SpaceX confidentially files for a public offering, while oil prices drop and markets rally amid geopolitical tensions.
news:news.news:keywords: SpaceX IPO news, Oil prices and market reactions, Oracle job cuts and AI investment, US fuel price trends, Washington millionaire tax implications

news:news.news:title: NASA successfully launched the Artemis II mission, marking a significant step toward returning humans to the Moon.
news:news.news:keywords: NASA Artemis II mission launch, legal issues with Moon base project, Apple iPhone anniversary, Kia EV3 electric SUV announcement, April Fools' Day tech pranks

news:news.news:title: Puka Nacua enters rehab amid legal issues, while Tiger Woods receives permission to seek treatment abroad and the NCAA considers new eligibility rules for athletes.
news:news.news:keywords: NCAA eligibility changes, Tiger Woods treatment, Puka Nacua rehab news, Celtics scoring record, World Cup ticket prices

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries range from microbial insights in colon cancer to the evolutionary history of squid, highlighting diverse advancements in understanding health and biology.
news:news.news:keywords: microbial fingerprints in cancer treatment, new species discovery in rainforest, effects of caffeine on behavior, evolutionary history of squid, impact of deep sleep on health

news:news.news:title: Indonesia Quakes as SpaceX Preps for IPO and NASA Reaches for the Moon with Artemis II Launch
